dj_text: That was Axel F (Crazy Frog) (Medieval Cover). We're not slowing down. Here's Who Let the Dogs Out (Medieval Cover). One more left in the queue.
commercial_text: Hey there, listeners! We've got a real headache of a time here at Pirate Bot DJ Radio — with that latest medieval cover

title: Who Let the Dogs Out (Medieval Cover)
